forbidden_reuse: D. Yet Another Monster Killing Problem

You play a computer game. In this game, you lead a party of $m$ heroes, and you have to clear a dungeon with $n$ monsters. Each monster is characterized by its power $a_i$. Each hero is characterized by his power $p_i...
不要复写原题的叙事结构、任务定义或样例套路。
不要只替换实体名称后保留同样的输入输出关系。
difference_plan.rationale: 该方案保持同族算法线索，但通过目标函数、结构选项、输入视角与不变量提示拉开差异。 objective=decision_possible，structural_options=allow_repeated_monsters, allow_repeated_heroes，input_options=zero_enabled_values, duplicate_friendly_input，invariant_options=counting_decomposition, signed_balance，预测距离=0.47，落地轴=I, C, O, V, T。

objective.description: 求完成所有任务所需的最小时间

constraints.name: flow_constraint
constraints.description: 每个英雄每天击败的怪物数量不超过其耐力值

constraints.name: ordering
constraints.description: 英雄必须按顺序击败怪物，不能跳过未击败的怪物

constraints.name: operation_limit
constraints.description: 每天只能选择一个英雄进入地牢

constraints.name: sum_constraint
constraints.description: 所有英雄的总耐力值必须足够击败所有怪物

constraints.name: flow_constraint
constraints.description: 每个英雄每天击败的怪物数量不超过其耐力值

constraints.name: ordering
constraints.description: 英雄必须按顺序击败怪物，不能跳过未击败的怪物

constraints.name: operation_limit

constraints.name: sum_constraint
constraints.description: 所有英雄的总耐力值必须足够击败所有怪物

objective.description: 求完成所有任务所需的最小时间

invariants.name: optimal_substructure
invariants.description: 最优子结构：问题的最优解可以通过子问题的最优解组合得到，即每一天选择英雄的决策基于当前剩余怪物和英雄状态的最优解。

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: 单调性：随着天数的增加，已击败的怪物数量单调递增，且每天选择的英雄在满足条件的情况下尽可能多地击败怪物。

invariants.name: greedy_choice
invariants.description: 贪心选择性质：每一步选择当天能够击败最多怪物的英雄，以最小化总天数。这种局部最优的选择最终导致全局最优解。

invariants.name: counting_decomposition
invariants.description: 总方案数可由若干互不重叠的子状态累积得到，允许使用 DP、容斥或分治计数。

invariants.name: signed_balance
invariants.description: 即使输入允许负值，关键状态仍可通过净贡献、偏移或平衡量统一表示。

invariants.name: optimal_substructure

theme.name: 校园运营
theme.mapping_hint: 把抽象约束映射成排队、分配、排课或借还流程。

generated_problem.error_reason: The provided instantiated_schema retains the core algorithmic logic of the original problem (CF1257D) despite the difference plan's claims. Specifically, the constraints (sequential processing, one resource per day, power threshold + endurance count limits) and objective (minimize days) define the exact same greedy + preprocessing solution as the original. Merely changing the theme to 'Campus Operations' violates Instruction 11 (No Skin). Additionally, there are critical internal contradictions: selected_objective.type is 'decision_possible' but instantiated_schema.objective.description is 'minimize time'; input_structure allows 0/negatives but instantiated_parameters specify min 1. These prevent reliable generation without violating hard constraints.
generated_problem.feedback: The upstream schema needs to: 1. Define distinct core constraints that alter the algorithmic approach (e.g., parallel processing, different resource consumption models, or non-sequential task handling). 2. Resolve the contradiction between objective type (decision vs minimization). 3. Consistent value ranges across all schema fields (parameters vs input_structure vs invariants). 4. Ensure the difference plan is actually reflected in the instantiated_schema, not just claimed in the rationale.
